titleStmt.title: SII 19.250: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 250. (A.R. No. 420 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. ON THE EAST WALL OF THE prākāra of the VYĀGHRAPĀDĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This is probably a record of Parakēsari Vikrama-Chōḷa. It records an endowment in money and land made by the Milāḍu chief Vaḍavaṉ Rājēndraṉ to the temple of Tiruppulippagavar-Āḻvār at Śiṟṟiṅgūr a brahmadēya in Kurukkāi-kūṟṟam a subdivision of Malāḍu Sixteen kaḻañju of gold was deposited with the temple authorities, with the intereston which the requirements for the sacred bath and offerings to the god were to be met on the days of the Uttara and Dakshiṇa-ayanas, the Aippas11i-vishu and of the eclipses during the year. For additional expenses including remuneration to the priest [āchārya-dakshiṇai] and 4 assistants, a nattappaḍappai and a quarter (kāṇi ?) of land were given and in addition, 12 copper-pots and a kanḍigai (spouted vessel) with 3 kaḻañju of gold as provision for their periodical repair or replacement.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kopparakecaripanmarkku yāṇṭu 10Āvatu malāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu brahmadeyam ciṟ ṟiṅkūr tiruppulippakavarāḻvārkku Uttira
ayaṉa saṅkiramattukkum dekṣaṇaayaṉa saṅkiramattukkum Aippaci viṣuvukkum kirāṇaṅkaḷuk kum Uḷḷiṭṭaṉattukkum tirumañcaṇattukkum Amutu ceytaruḷavum Ivvūr śrīkoyilu ṭaiyārkaḷpakkal kuṭutta poṉ patiṉaṟu kaḻañcāl Āṇṭu Oṉṟukkup palicaiyāl Arici mukkalamum kaṟiamutu Iraṇṭum tayiramutu muṉṉāḻi
kkum Āṭiaruḷa Uṭpaṭa neyyamutu Aṟunāḻiyum Aṭaikkāyamutu Irupatum Ilaiamutu Eṇpatum maṟṟum veṇṭuvaṉa navaṉa(snapana)traivyaṅkaḷukkum Ācāriyadekṣaṇaikkum viṭṭa nilamāvatu Ittevar koyilil kiḻpāl Ūreyaṟap poṉa vaḻikku kiḻakkum Aḻiñ ciṟkollaikku vaṭakkum māntoṭṭattukku meṟkum Ekacuraṉvāykkālukku
teṟkum Uḷḷiṭṭa nattappaṭappaiyum Uḷḷūril vaṭakkaṭaiya nilaṅ kālum koṇṭu Itti vasaṅkaḷukku Ācāriyaṉ Oruvaṉukkum nālu māṇukkum Ic śrīkoyiluṭaiyārpakkal ceppukkalacam paṉṉiraṇṭum kalacam Oṉṟiṉāl niṟai Aṟupalamum keṇṭikai Oṉṟiṉāl niṟai paṉṉirupalamum Ivai Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum A
tayavu nikka Ic śrīkoyiluṭaiyārpakkal kuṭutta poṉ mukkaḻañcum Ippaṭi Ippoṉṉum Iṉnattakkuṟaiyum Iṉnilamum Ikkalacamum Ikkeṇṭikaiyum Icśrīkoyiluṭai yār pakkal candrādityavat niṟpatākap paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ milāṭuṭaiyāṉ vaṭavaṉ rājentra- neṉ Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 19.250 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
